nodes.name: WTI Crude Oil
wishlist: Upgrade to a lower-latency data source (paid feed) so updates are sub-minute instead of 15-minute delayed
Add a sparkline showing the last 24h of price movement

nodes.name: US government attempt to lower paper oil price
nodes.prompt: The US government has a vested interest in keeping the price of paper oil on the lower side to avoid a panic in the stock market. You will scout the underlying composition and influence nodes in the deeper layers of this model and you will give a likelihood from 1-10 that the US government is about to do something to lower the oil price.
wishlist: Decide how this aggregator's value is composed from its future child nodes
Add child nodes (e.g. US bond yield, political pressure indicators)

nodes.name: Market Manipulation intended to rescue stock market
nodes.prompt: You are to assume the government will do whatever is necessary but also plausibly deniable to the public in order to keep the stock market high. This specific node is about direct intervention in the market. Potentially with capital. Potentially with trading rules or restrictions.
wishlist: Add additional sub-nodes (trading rules, capital injections, etc.)

nodes.name: Treasury Shorting Paper Oil
nodes.prompt: The US treasury has the mechanism to short paper oil. This direct intervention in the market is unethical but difficult to prove, and the tools and the Treasury Stabilization Fund exist to make this possible, so we will treat it as possible.
